response.objective_caption: A woman with long brown hair wearing a dark blue embroidered shirt holds a beverage can while standing beside a man with tousled hair and a goatee wearing a blue button-down shirt in a dining room; the man has his arm around the woman's shoulder and his mouth open in a wide expression, while a partially visible person's arm and torso appear at the left edge of the frame. Behind them are framed photographs on a pale wall, a lit ceiling fixture, and wooden dining chairs.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An amateur snapshot with obstructed cropping shows a woman in a dark blue embroidered shirt holding a beverage can beside a man in a blue button-down shirt who leans in with his arm around her shoulder and a surprised open-mouthed expression; the unplanned composition includes a partially cut-off figure intruding on the left edge and conveys casual vernacular energy, with framed photographs on the wall, a ceiling light, and wooden chairs visible in the dining room background.
